title: Melons Better Minecraft
description: Just that random modpack out there
body:
# Melon Better Minecraft This modpack was made just for a vanilla Minecraft experience with mostly optimazion. Hope to grow the mods in this pack in the future

MODS INCLUDED ARE

  • Loading Mods
  • many Qol Mods
  • Performance Mods
  • Resource Packs
  • Shaders
  • AND MUCH MORE
# Info/Contact

Click here for discord!

Contact me at "abstractmelons@gmail.com" OR "abstractmelon#0115"

We hope you enjoy the Pack:)
